summary: Per-Asset FIFO Bug Fix Verification Complete - All 11 backend tests passed. The FIFO calculation now correctly groups transactions by asset and processes each asset independently. BTC buys match BTC sells, ETH buys match ETH sells, etc. Frontend verified: wallet_only is selected by default when wallet address is present. Form 8949 export shows correct asset names.
critical_code_review_comments: Per-asset FIFO fix in unified_tax_service.py correctly groups by asset before FIFO calculation
Form 8949 export correctly shows gain.get('asset', symbol) for description column
UnifiedTaxDashboard line 47 correctly defaults to wallet_only when walletAddress is present
seed_data_creation: Created multi-asset Coinbase CSV with BTC, ETH, SOL, ALGO, DOGE transactions for testing per-asset FIFO. Data is cleaned up after each test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-asset FIFO bug fix verified. Test file test_per_asset_fifo.py contains 11 tests covering: 1) CSV import with multiple assets, 2) Per-asset FIFO calculation, 3) BTC FIFO correctness, 4) DOGE (no sells) exclusion from realized gains, 5) Reasonable gain values (not billions), 6) Form 8949 export with correct asset names, 7) wallet_only default data source, 8) Combined mode multi-asset support.
features_verified: Per-asset FIFO calculation in unified tax service - BTC buys match BTC sells
Per-asset FIFO in historical tax enrichment
Form 8949 export shows correct asset names (BTC, ETH, SOL) not chain symbol
Form 8949 header shows 'Multiple (N assets)' when multiple assets present
UnifiedTaxDashboard defaults to wallet_only when wallet address is present
Combined mode (wallet + exchange) produces correct per-asset results
Exchange-only mode works correctly with multiple assets
Wallet-only Solana analysis returns reasonable numbers (not billions)
Tax calculations with CSV import produce reasonable numbers for multi-asset portfolio
bugs_fixed_verified: FIFO now groups by asset before calculation - no more cross-asset matching
BTC sells now match BTC buys (verified with expected gain ~$10,400)
DOGE with only buys correctly excluded from realized gains
No billion-dollar gains observed - all values are reasonable
Form 8949 CSV shows actual asset names (BTC, ETH, SOL) in description
wallet_only is default data source when wallet address provided

test_details.test_unified_tax_exchange_only_per_asset: PASSED - Exchange-only mode returns FIFO data with assets_tracked >= 4
test_details.test_realized_gains_per_asset_match: PASSED - Each gain entry has consistent asset field
test_details.test_gain_calculations_reasonable: PASSED - No gains exceed $100k per transaction, total under $1M
test_details.test_btc_fifo_correct: PASSED - BTC gain ~$10,400 matches expected (0.4 BTC sold at $68k, cost basis from first lot at $42k)
test_details.test_doge_no_sells_no_gains: PASSED - DOGE has 0 realized gains (only buys, no sells)
test_details.test_assets_tracked_count: PASSED - Tracks 5 assets (BTC, ETH, SOL, ALGO, DOGE)
test_details.test_form_8949_shows_correct_asset_names: PASSED - CSV contains BTC, ETH, SOL asset names
test_details.test_wallet_only_data_source_works: PASSED - Solana wallet analysis returns reasonable numbers
test_details.test_combined_mode_reasonable_numbers: PASSED - Combined mode returns reasonable totals
